feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: F4 help for custom application job
entry.content:
Hi members,

I want to create a custom application job with f4 help.
I used IF_APJ_RT_VALUE_HELP_EXIT this interface to create a class and assigned it to application job catalog entry as value help.

 But the value help is not visible in when scheduling the application job.

 Please let me know if there is any other way to add value help to the parameters in custom application job or am I missing anything.

Regards,
Bharath

entry.title: Details of PR not showing on MY Fiori Inbox SAP S4/HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

Im using Fiory My inbox to approuve PR but the details for the items are not showing bellow "Screenshot bellow"

Im using PR overall release 

SAP Vesrion 

 

The services of the App ID  :  F0401A  has been added by the baisis by still have issue (SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library (ondemand.com)) and as shown in fiori libray, the item can be displayed 

 Could you please help

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Analytic Stories
entry.content:
Hi,

We have just started to utilise Analytic Stories and I had a few questions.

  • Is it possible to group columns/rows in AS? e.g I have monthly columns, I add a calculation for quarters and then group them into quarters?
  • How can I format characters e.g. $ or % signs
  • Is there an a site that shares the basics of AS? I know there is the what’s new and the Manage Analytics Stories page but it’s not really a ‘walkthrough’.

Thanks in advance,

Scott

entry.title: Configure SAP Workflow Task in Fiori My Inbox
entry.content:
Dear All,

  We have a customized  workflow which is working as expected . The requirement to configure the work item triggered by workflow into Fiori Inbox ( worktimes are already triggered in SAP Inbox).

Please help.

Thanks,

Arpita

entry.title: Which website is the best to learn a SAPUI5 javascript language?
entry.content:
Which website is the best to learn a detailed SAPUI5 javascript language?

I already check this Step 1: Ready... - Documentation - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK (ondemand.com) but I can't find a detailed documentation of javascript for SAPUI5 it only gives me a sample. syntax and result

The documentation im looking for is a documentation like ABAP / Java where it explains the purpose of every keyword/syntax

entry.title: how to Integrate HID Fingerprint Reader in SAP UI5/Fiori and CAP in BAS
entry.content:
I am creating a web application with CAP and SAP UI5 using SAP fiori elements in SAP BAS and I need to implement the use of a HID Digital Persona U.are.U® 4500 Fingerprint Reader to capture a person's biometric data (fingerprint).

I have tried to integrate the use of the Chrome WebApi to connect to the device with the following code:

const filters = [
        {
            vendorId: 1466,
            productId: 10
        }
    ];
    
    const devices = await navigator.usb.requestDevice({ filters: filters }).then(device => {
        console.log(device.productName);      
        console.log(device.manufacturerName);
        console.log(device)
        var select = device;
        return select.open();
      }).catch(error => { console.error(error); });

But when I try to run it, it returns the following:

Does anyone know how I could solve this error?
or perhaps know of any other way to do this?

The WebApi documentation is as follows:
https://developer.chrome.com/docs/capabilities/usb?hl=es-419

And documentation on the use of the device on the web
https://hidglobal.github.io/digitalpersona-authentication/index.html

However, I have not been able to understand how to integrate this last one into SAP UI5

Thank you very much for your help!!

SAP Fiori SAP Fiori Elements SAP Cloud Application Programming Model SAP Business Application Studio SAP HANA Cloud JavaScript #UI5 SAP Cloud Applications Studio SAP Fiori Client SAP Fiori Cloud SAP Business Technology Platform SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment HTML5

entry.title: How to set Overflow Settings on the personalisation settings button that smart table provides
entry.content:
I have my smart table below with given custom buttons added ->



However, when the midColumnPage is populated by clicking a row the settings button goes into overflow. I can control other custom controls' overflow behaviour but not the settings button that smarttable gives by default. I don't need the Settings button to go into overflow.

entry.title: I have a business Requirement to extend FIORI app - Post Goods Receipt for Inbound Delivery
entry.content:
I have a business Requirement to extend FIORI app - Post Goods Receipt for Inbound Delivery
Currently, S4 creates purchase order with vendor for core and battery products specially with ORD vendor. Based on BOM set up, when PO gets created for battery products, core automatically gets added as second line.

Requirement is to enhance the standard app when inbound delivery line item has Higher-level item value populated (LIPS- UEPOS not equal to blank), then do not show item on screen.
I found BADI MMIM_GR4XY_PROVIDE_DATA to write custom code, any ideas how to fetch data from LIPS table to fetch UEPOS value, (SELECT statement is giving error 'Use of table is not permitted')

entry.title: My Inbox Extension Application: Standard modules not loading
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have an extension of My Inbox application which has stopped working. This was migrated from old system and none of the experts who worked on it are there in the team. Issue is that in my odata calls, we have few custom data coming in which is supposed to be formatted through my inbox standard conversion files(These can be found inside standard my inbox app under util folder)

But for some reason when we run the application these files are not getting fetched. I don't see the in network tab or in component-preload.

 

jQuery.sap.require("cross.fnd.fiori.inbox.util.Conversions");
This don't seem to be loading the file. or somehow its not getting linked with the formatter.



I am getting below issue in the application

This is my component

This is the initial part of my custom controller

This is the fragment where I am using these standard js files as formatter

My UI is coming like this because of this

entry.title: SAP FIORI My Timesheet App
entry.content:
Hi

May you please assist.
I would like to add a search bar to the "Import Admin Assignments" results screen.
Is there a BADI/User Exit I can use to add the search bar.

Kind Regards

entry.title: Why is the first column in my tree table not visible in the personalisation settings?
entry.content:
I have a smart table - tree table like this ->

However, when I click on the personalisation settings button, I do not see the Column -> "code" over there.

I am not sure why it is happening, as its not happening with a specific column, but any column that is at index 0

entry.title: SAP Fiori App F1311A My Leave Requests: missing team calender
entry.content:
Dear all,

we are missing the team calender in the app mentions above. It was available in the WebDynpro Apps. In our opinion it is important to check with the absences of the colleagues. They are neither on the start screen nor on the create screen available. 

Does anyone know, why it is not available or if it's possible to make it available? 

Thanks in advance!
Best regards, Chris

entry.title: Fiori Reuse Library Application Log 'script load error'
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I have created a FIORI application with the Business Application Studio using the Freestyle Template. My intention was to integrate the Fiori Reuse Library to get the Application Log component. 

I used the SAP hel page Freestyle App Integration to do so.

When using the Terminal and executing 'npm run build' and afterwards 'npm run start-local' the application opens in a browser window. The problem here is, that the page is empty.

When I open the developer tools with F12, I get following error.

It says: 'ModuleError: failed to load 'sap/nw/core/applogs/lib/reuse/applogs/Component.js' from ../resources/sap/nw/core/applogs/lib/reuse/applogs/Component.js: script load error'

What did I wrong? I inserted every part mentioned in the help page.

Best Regards,
Martin

entry.title: Fiori Launchpad - Display one Fiori group per tab in
entry.content:
Hello,

We want to show only one group in one tab on main page but it shows all groups as list and scrolls down when user click group tab. We did configuration as the screenshot below but Main Page still shows all groups in one page.

But if we change user setting to "Show one group at a time" , the page works as we want perfectly. How can we set this setting for all users?

Thanks.

entry.title: Extends Manage Billing Documents
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I'm trying to exntends Manage Billing Documents.

An extension requirement is to add search criteria fields (sales organization, sales channel).

Is it possible?

If possible, how can I add these fields?

Could I use Fiori Elements on BAS?

I am not adept at extending the standard SAP fiori apps.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP RAP - Create of grandchild is not working/reacting
entry.content:
Hi Community! 🙂

For a longer time we´re facing an issue with our RAP application. We are not able to do a create on a table, which is a grandchild of our root entity

Situation:

  • Root Entity (Location)
  • [0..1] Composition from Location -> Entity Topic (in this case Nature, we have 5 in total)

 

 

composition [0..1] of ZEHS_I_DemoTopic_Nature        as _TopicNatureDemo2

 

 

 

  • [0..*] Composition from Topic -> Entity with table entries

 

 

composition [0..*] of ZEHS_I_Demo_LOCENVINVSP_NATURE as _InvSpNature

 

 

Location -> [0..1] Location -> [0..*] Table

Behavior Definition:

 

 

// Location
define behavior for I_Location alias Location
lock master
etag master LastChangedDateTime
with unmanaged save
{
  update;

  field ( readonly ) Country, LocationID, CountryText, LocationTypeText, RegionText, Region;

  association _TopicNatureDemo2 { create; }
  }

// Topic
        define behavior for I_DemoTopic_Nature alias DemoTopicNature
        lock dependent by _Location
        with unmanaged save
        {
          update;

          association _InvSpNature { create; }

//          field ( readonly, numbering : managed ) LocationEnvDetTopicUUID;
          field ( readonly ) EHSLocationUUID;

          association _Location;
        }

// Table inside Topic (_InvSpNature)
        // Invasive Species
        define behavior for I_Demo_LOCENVINVSP_NATURE alias DemoInvSpNature
        persistent table ...
        lock dependent by _Location
        etag master LastChangeDateTime
        {
          update;
          delete;

          field ( readonly, numbering : managed ) LocationEnvDetInvSpeUUID;
          field ( readonly ) EHSLocationUUID, LocationEnvDetTopicUUID;

          association _TopicNature;
          association _Location;
        }

 

 

So far we see an ObjectPage with our Section Nature Topic. In this Section, there is also the table with our lineItems.

 

Problem:

We can navigate into the LineItems and delete them, but pressing on the create button is doing nothing. Can someone help us out? We´re struggling with that for a long time now..

Additional Information:
We also developed a Fiori App via BAS and added a custom Navigation to the manifest.json. Navigation and Delete/Update works, create button still doesnt react.

 

 

              "ObjectPage|DemoInvSpNature": {
                "component": {
                  "name": "sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage"
                },
                "entitySet": "DemoInvSpNature",
                "navigationProperty": "to_TopicNatureDemo2/to_InvSpNature"
              }

entry.title: Fiori Elements / open SAP - Week 2 Unit 6 Adding custom controls and logic / SAP building blocks
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I am currently attending the openSAP course on Fiori Elements.
In the chapter “Week 2 Unit 6: Adding custom controls and logic” / Make use of building blocks provided by SAP Fiori elements I have the problem that no values for CreatedAt and AgencyID are displayed in my Object Page:

My code regarding GeoMap.fragment.xml is identical to the default from the Github repostiory

Does anyone have any idea what the problem could be?

entry.title: How to check average number of users connecting to the Fiori applications/services
entry.content:
I'm looking to access the connection statistics for the various eRH/Fiori applications. I would like to know the average number of users connecting to the Fiori applications/services per day, week, or month, as well as information on load peaks.  
Do you have any idea how we can obtain this information?

entry.title: Configure the SWFVISU for Parked document
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am currently trying to create the visualization parameters on SWFVISU for displaying header and item information of 'Parked Document' (Business Object: FIPP) I was looking for the corresponding My Inbox FIORI Service, and i came up with one service 'Verify Journal Entries in General Ledger - For Processor (Inbox)',

I tried to fill all the parameters in my custom task (TS90000084) based on standard task,

 

however, it didnt work and it showed error 

Can anyone share the correct visualization parameter for custom decision task of Parked Document (FIPP)?

 

Regards,

Muhammad Febrian Rizky

entry.title: How to add Date Range filter in Column header of ui table(sap.ui.table)
entry.content:
I am trying to add a Date Range filter in the column header of an sap.ui.table.Table. The solution I found in this SAP Community post seems to be outdated and doesn't work with the latest SAP UI5 versions.

Is there an updated approach to implement a Date Range filter directly in the column header? Ideally, I would like to use sap.m.DateRangeSelection or a similar control that fits within the sap.ui.table.Column. How can this be achieved while ensuring compatibility with recent UI5 versions?

Any help or working example would be much appreciated!
